section_name: Deposit of Fee in State Highway Fund and in Texas Department of Motor Vehicles Fund
chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text:
A fee collected under this subchapter shall be deposited as follows:

(1) 90 percent to the credit of the state highway fund; and

(2) 10 percent to the credit of the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles fund.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.197 — Deposit of Fee in State Highway Fund and in Texas Department of Motor Vehicles Fund

A fee collected under this subchapter shall be deposited as follows:

    (1) 90 percent to the credit of the state highway fund; and

    (2) 10 percent to the credit of the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles fund.

*Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1287 (H.B.2202), Sec. 60, eff. September 1, 2013.*

subsections.text: A fee collected under this subchapter shall be deposited as follows:
90 percent to the credit of the state highway fund; and
10 percent to the credit of the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles fund.
